title: astragalus adsurgens subsp. oreogenus
intro: Astragalus adsurgens subsp. oreogenus is a type of plant that belongs to the Astragalus genus, commonly known as milkvetch or goat's thorn, and is native to the Himalayan region. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its immunomodulatory and adaptogenic properties. The health benefits of Astragalus adsurgens subsp. oreogenus include its ability to enhance the immune system, reduce stress and fatigue, and promote overall well-being. This plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including capsules, teas, and tinctures, which can be used to support health and vitality.
